description: dodo.ac operates Nookipedia, a community-maintained Animal Crossing wiki and data source. Its APIs provide structured Animal Crossing game data derived from the Nookipedia wiki.
summary: dodo.ac exposes two documented HTTP APIs for Nookipedia: the current Nookipedia API at `https://api.nookipedia.com/` with an OpenAPI spec, and a deprecated legacy API at `https://nookipedia.com/api/`; both require a Nookipedia-issued API key.
